info.name: CHB Portal - Complete API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Clock Hour Basis (CHB) Portal Backend.

**How to use:**
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:8000)
2. Call 'Login For Access Token' first - it auto-saves the token
3. All other requests use the saved token automatically

**Structure:**
- Each step folder contains 'Core APIs' and 'AI APIs' sub-folders
- Steps are ordered from Authentication through Step 10

request.name: Read Users
request.description: Admin only: List all users in the system.

request.name: Candidate Register
request.description:
Public endpoint for candidate registration.
Sets role to CANDIDATE automatically and creates a Candidate profile.

request.name: Forgot Password
request.description: Initiates a password reset flow. Sends an email to the user if the account exists.

request.name: Register User
request.description: Endpoint to register a new user. In production, this might be restricted to ADMIN only.

request.name: Reset Password
request.description: Resets the password using a valid token.

request.name: Legacy Assessments Alias
request.description: Backward-compat alias for clients still calling /requirements/assessments.

request.name: Course Setup
request.description:
Unified API: Define both Intake and Norm for a specific course in one call.

- Resolves the course by institution_id + course_name.
- Creates or updates the IntakeDefinition for that course + academic_year.
- Creates or updates the Norm for that course + academic_year.
- Auto-derives course_category from course metadata if not provided.
- Returns the complete setup result.

request.name: Get Course Setup
request.description: Retrieve the Intake and Norm configuration for a specific course and academic year.

request.name: Get Courses
request.description: List all courses, optionally filtered by institution.

request.name: Get Course
request.description: Get specific course details.

request.name: Update Course
request.description: Update Course details.

request.name: Get Course Intakes
request.description: Retrieve all intake counts (approved vs admitted) for a specific course across all years.

request.name: Generate Requirements
request.description: Calculate required faculty using complex relational logic and JSONB formula.

request.name: Get Institutions
request.description: List all institutions with their courses.

request.name: Create Institution
request.description: Seed data: Create Institution and its Courses.

request.name: Update Institution
request.description: Update institution details.

request.name: Delete Institution
request.description:
Enterprise-grade deletion of an institution.

- Requires ADMIN role.
- Cascades deletion to Courses, Intakes, Norms, Requirements, Vacancies, and Advertisements.
- Users associated with the institution are NOT deleted but unlinked.
- Includes audit logging.

request.name: Get Intakes
request.description:
List intakes, optionally filtered by institution and academic year.
Includes course name by joining with the Course table.

request.name: Define Intake
request.description: Admin defines student intake for a specific Course (resolved by name and institution).

request.name: Get Norms
request.description:
List norms filtered by institution + academic year.
PRINCIPAL: institution_id auto-set from token; cannot query other institutions.
ADMIN: institution_id required as query param.

request.name: Create Norm
request.description: Admin creates a single institution-scoped norm.

request.name: Seed Dte Defaults Endpoint
request.description: Idempotent: seed all 5 DTE course-wise norms for an institution.

request.name: Update Norm
request.description: Update norm details.

request.name: Validate Requirements
request.description: Flags anomalies and returns AI-augmented analysis.

request.name: Ai Query Database
request.description:
Experimental: Automatic natural language query for Step 1 data.
Uses LLM to generate SQL based on schema.

item.name: Core APIs
item.description: Standard CRUD endpoints for Vacancy Identification (Step 2)

body.raw:
{
  "institution_id": 1,
  "course_id": 1,
  "academic_year": "2026-2027",
  "confirmed_count": 3,
  "justification": "Based on DTE norms and current workload analysis"
}
